requirement.description: The gateway shall append a CRC to safety-critical messages and reject incoming messages with invalid CRC.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that GW_SafetyMessage contains a CRC field.
preconditions: CAN monitoring tool configured for message ID 0x119
test_cases.expected_result: CRC field is present in every GW_SafetyMessage frame.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify CRC value updates when SafetyData changes.
test_cases.expected_result: CRC value changes corresponding to SafetyData changes.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify CRC remains stable when SafetyData does not change.
test_cases.expected_result: CRC value remains unchanged when SafetyData is unchanged.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify CRC field is within valid range.
Verify gateway rejects incoming safety message with invalid CRC.
preconditions: CAPL configured to inject invalid CRC
test_steps: Inject GW_SafetyMessage with corrupted CRC via CAPL
Monitor Gateway output or forwarding behavior
test_cases.expected_result: Gateway rejects the message; no forwarding or processing occurs.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_c05_005_reject_invalid_crc(can_bus):
    time.sleep(2)
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x119, 1, timeout=2.0)
    assert not msgs

test_cases.test_objective: Verify gateway resumes processing after valid CRC is restored.
preconditions: Gateway ECU previously received invalid CRC messages
test_steps: Inject valid CRC GW_SafetyMessage via CAPL
test_cases.expected_result: Gateway accepts and processes valid CRC messages.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_c05_006_accept_valid_crc_after_recovery(can_bus):
    time.sleep(2)
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x119, 2)
    assert msgs

test_cases.test_objective: Verify CRC is present in every GW_SafetyMessage over time.
test_cases.expected_result: CRC field present and valid in all frames.
